text:
Once upon a time, in a small forest village nestled between shimmering lakes...

There lived a cheerful squirrel named Olive. Each morning, Olive filled her fluffy tail with nuts as big as coins and chirped happily as she danced across the-leaves. One particular day, Olive stumbled upon a mysterious, ancient oak tree. The tree had eyes like pools of glittering moonlight.

Whispering secrets to the nocturnal creatures that lived there, Olive learned that the oak was cursed - not with bad luck, but with dreams. It dreamted endlessly about a lost love.

Olive decided she could help. Every night, before bedtime stars appeared. She'd softly tell the dreamscape dreams. Over time, the oak began to grow stronger... dreams became visions... and love Returned.

They didn't live forever, alas. But their laughter echoed in dreams until the oak itself grew old.

And so love lived on...

Every now and then, when you lay down to dream...

Remember Olive.

But
